snippet.title: Ancajas vs Rodriguez HIGHLIGHTS: April 10, 2021 | PBC on SHOWTIME
snippet.description:

Fight Night Recap: http://pbcham.ps/FightNight-041021

snippet.title: RICH Girl vs BROKE Girl Chocolate Fondue Challenge | Funny Battle with Food by RATATA BOOM
snippet.description:

24 Hours Eating One Color Snacks and Sweets: https://youtu.be/LiTxa_CdkEo

You can eat anything with chocolate fondue! And it doesn't matter whether you are a rich girl or a poor one - chocolate will make any food delicious! Or is it still not? Well, let's check it out with the RICH Girl vs BROKE Girl Chocolate Fondue Challenge!

snippet.title: LAKERS at NETS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | April 10, 2021
snippet.description:
LAKERS at NETS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | April 10, 2021

The Los Angeles Lakers defeated the Brooklyn Nets, 126-101. Andre Drummond led the Lakers with 20 PTS and 11 REB, while Dennis Schroder added 19 PTS and 4 AST in the victory. Kevin Durant tallied 22 PTS, 7 REB and 5 AST for the Nets in the losing effort. The Lakers improve to 33-20 on the season, while the Nets fall to 36-17.

Next Games:
Los Angeles Lakers at New York Knicks - Apr. 12 at 7:30pm/et on ESPN
Brooklyn Nets at Minnesota Timberwolves - Apr. 12 at 8pm/et on NBA League Pass

snippet.title: Why Rica Walked Away From Showbiz | Toni Talks
snippet.description:
It was very nice to do this catch up with Rica. From reminiscing the good old days to sharing realizations from the hardest decision she made in her entire career, this has just been a fun and enlightening talk.

Kindly follow her channel:
https://youtube.com/c/RicaPeralejoBonifacio

snippet.title: The Demons Baron Battled | Toni Talks
snippet.description: Talking to Baron made me reflect on my own life, the truth is, we all have done things in the past we are not proud of and we wouldnвҖҷt want to see in the headlines. But the beauty of his story is that no matter how many times you messed up your life, God will always love you and will never look at you the way others do.

Official Lyrics:
 
Mr. perfect face
Mr. here to stay
Mr. looked me in the eye and told me you would never go away
Everything was right
Mr. IвҖҷve been waiting for you all my life
Mr. every single day until the end I will be by your side
But that was when I got to know
Mr. change of heart
Mr. leaves me all alone
I fall apart
It takes everything in me just to get up each day
But itвҖҷs wonderful to see that youвҖҷre okay

Hello, Mr. perfectly fine
HowвҖҷs your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Hello, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
IвҖҷve been Miss misery since your goodbye
And youвҖҷre Mr. perfectly fine

Mr. never told me why
Mr. never had to see me cry
Mr. insincere apology so he doesnвҖҷt look like the bad guy
He goes about his day
Forgets he ever even heard my name
Well I thought you might be different than the rest
I guess youвҖҷre all the same
Because I hear heвҖҷs got his arm вҖҳround a brand new girl
IвҖҷve been picking up my heart
HeвҖҷs been picking up her
And I never got past what you put me through
But itвҖҷs wonderful to see that it never phased you

Repeat chorus

So dignified in your well pressed suit
So strategized
All the eyes on you
Sashay your way to your seat
ItвҖҷs the best seat
In the best room
Oh, heвҖҷs so smug
Mr. always wins
So far above me in every sense
So far above feeling anything

And itвҖҷs really such a shame
ItвҖҷs such a shame
Cause I was Miss here to stay
Now IвҖҷm Miss gonna be alright someday
And someday maybe youвҖҷll miss me
But by then youвҖҷll be Mr. too late

Goodbye, Mr. perfectly fine
HowвҖҷs your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Goodbye, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
IвҖҷve been Miss misery for the last time
And youвҖҷre Mr. perfectly fine
YouвҖҷre perfectly fine
Mr. look me in the eye and tell me you

snippet.title: Game Recap: Lakers 126, Nets 101
snippet.description: The Lakers defeated the Nets, 126-101. Andre Drummond led the Lakers with 20 points and 11 rebounds, while Dennis Schroder added 19 points and four assists in the victory. Kevin Durant tallied 22 points, seven rebounds and five assists for the Nets in the losing effort. The Lakers improve to 33-20 on the season, while the Nets fall to 36-17.

snippet.title: Japan sends destroyer to track China's Liaoning aircraft | Okinawa islands | Latest English News
snippet.description:

snippet.title: Bruno Mars - Talking To The Moon (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
вҷ« Bruno Mars - Talking To The Moon
Stream/Download: 

вҖў Bruno Mars вҖў 
вҖў http://www.brunomars.comвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢ 
вҖў http://www.instagram.com/brunomarsвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢ 
вҖў http://www.twitter.com/brunomarsвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢ 
вҖў http://www.facebook.com/brunomarsвҖӢвҖӢ 

(Lyrics):
[Verse 1]
I know you're somewhere
Out there
Somewhere far away
I want you back
I want you back
My neighbors think I'm crazy
But they don't understand
You're all I had
You're all I had

[Pre-chorus]
At night when the stars
Light up my room
I sit by myself
[Chorus]
Talking to the moon
TryвҖҷna get to you
In hopes you're on the
Other side
Talking to me too
Or am I a fool
Who sits alone
Talking to the moon

[Verse 2]
I'm feelinвҖҷ like I'm famous
The talk of the town
They say I've gone mad
Yeah I've gone mad
But they don't know
What I know
Cuz when the sun
Goes down
SomeoneвҖҷs talkinвҖҷ back
Yeah they're talkinвҖҷ back

[Pre-chorus]
At night when the stars
Light up my room
I sit by myself

[Chorus]
Talking to the moon
TryвҖҷna get to you
In hopes you're on the
Other side
Talking to me too
Or am I a fool
Who sits alone
Talking to the moon

[Bridge]
Do you ever hear me callinвҖҷ
Cuz every night I'm talkinвҖҷ
To the moon...

[Chorus]
Still tryвҖҷna get to you
In hopes you're on the
Other side
Talking to me too
Or am I a fool
Who sits alone
Talking to the moon

[Outro]
I know you're somewhere
Out there
Somewhere far away

snippet.title: Prince Philip dies: Queen faces a future without her вҖҳstrength and stayвҖҷ | ITV News
snippet.description:
After over 70 years with him by her side, Queen Elizabeth must now face a future without Philip, the man she once honoured as her "strength and stay", the longest serving royal consort in British history.вҖҜ 

Elizabeth II has become the first reigning widow monarch since Queen Victoria, who was so devastated by the death of Prince Albert, she withdrew almost entirely from public life for 40 years and become known as the вҖҳWidow of WindsorвҖҷ.

snippet.title: 'Mrs World' grabs crown from head of вҖҳMrs Sri LankaвҖҷ in on-stage fracas
snippet.description:
Police have arrested the reigning вҖңMrs WorldвҖқ on charges of assault over an on-stage fracas in which she pulled the crown off the head of the new вҖңMrs Sri LankaвҖқ. 

Subscribe to Guardian News on YouTube в–ә http://bit.ly/guardianwiressub

Caroline Jurie yanked the crown off Pushpika de Silva minutes after she was declared вҖңMrs Sri Lanka 2020вҖқ during a gala in Colombo on April 4. Jurie declared that Pushpika de Silva was ineligible as the winner because she was divorced, and forcibly removed her crown. De Silva needed hospital treatment after the incident, seen by stunned spectators in a packed venue as well as a live social media audience. 

To qualify for the title, contestants must be married. De Silva is estranged from her husband, but they are still legally married. The local franchise holder for the pageant, Chandimal Jayasinghe, said they were вҖңdeeply disturbed and sincerely regretвҖқ the behaviour of Jurie and the told the media the crown would be returned to De Silva 

вҖҳMrs WorldвҖҷ arrested for grabbing crown from head of вҖҳMrs Sri LankaвҖҷ в–ә https://www.theguardian.com/world/2021/apr/08/mrs-world-arrested-for-grabbing-crown-from-head-of-mrs-sri-lanka

The Guardian publishes independent journalism, made possible by supporters. Contribute to The Guardian today в–ә https://bit.ly/3uhA7zg

Website в–ә https://www.theguardian.com
Facebook в–әhttps://www.facebook.com/theguardian

snippet.title: Magpakailanman: Quenching my brother-in-law's thirst | Full Episode
snippet.description:
Born like two birds of a feather, sisters April (Kim Rodriguez) and May (Faith Da Silva) have always got each other's backs ever since. However, as the two sisters get married to their partners, they will both get tangled up by the man they truly love. What could April possibly do when she finds out that her husband, Edong (Ervic Vijandre) engages in an affair with his own sister-in-law?

Watch episodes of 'Magpakailanman' every Saturday at 8:50 PM on GMA Network, hosted by Ms. Mel Tiangco. This episode, "Huwag Ate, Huwag Bayaw," stars Kim Rodriguez, Faith Da Silva, Rodjun Cruz, Ervic Vijandre, Lovely Rivero, Mike Lloren, Rein Adriano, and Kim Belles. #Magpakailanman #MPKFullEpisode

snippet.title: APEKZ - 24 BARS MARK BEATS CHALLENGE 2021
snippet.description:

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! рҹ‘Җ


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter в–ә https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram в–әhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook в–әhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-Вӯfilled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

snippet.title: Twenty One Pilots - Shy Away (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Twenty One Pilots - Shy Away (Official Video)
Twenty One Pilots official video for "Shy Away" from the forthcoming album Scaled And Icy, available May 21st on Fueled By Ramen.

Twenty One Pilots - Livestream Experience
May 21 @ 8PM ET / 5PM PT
Tickets available at http://live.twentyonepilots.com 

Stream / Download "Shy Away" - https://top.lnk.to/SAI
Pre-order / Pre-Save Scaled And Icy - https://top.lnk.to/SAI

Directed by Miles Cable & AJ Favicchio

LYRICS
When I get home,
You better not be there
We're placing bets you won't
Shed your modesty
And the only thing to leave behind
Is your own skin on the floor

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard
Don't you shh...

When you get home
You barely recognize the pictures they
put in a frame
'Cause you shed your modesty
Don't circle the track
Take what you have
and leave your skin on the floor.

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

When I get home
Boy, you better not be there
You're long gone
Shed your modesty
Don't circle the track
Just break the cycle in half
and leave your skin on the floor.

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

that's never heard...

an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

Don't you shy away.

snippet.title: Make a peach blossom crown with silk flowers | з”Ёз»ўиҠұе·ҘиүәеҒҡдәҶеҘ—жЎғиҠұеҸ‘еҶ пјҢеёҰдёҠзҲұдәәжөӘдәҶдёҖжҠҠжҳҘеӨ©дёЁLiziqi Channel
snippet.description:
Please  subscribe to гҖҗжқҺеӯҗжҹ’ Liziqi гҖ‘Liziqi Channel on YouTube if you like my videos: https://goo.gl/nkjpSx 
#жқҺеӯҗжҹ’#Liziqi#lГҪtб»ӯthбәҘ#ChineseCuisine #ChineseFood
 гҖҗжқҺеӯҗжҹ’ Liziqi гҖ‘ https://goo.gl/nkjpSx
--------------------------------------------------------------------
Make a peach blossom crown with silk flowers, and catch the spring breeze with my dear Granny.

жңҖиҝ‘и·ҹеҺ»е№ҙиҝҮе®Ңе№ҙдёҖж ·пјҢжҗҒе®¶йҮҢеҝҷжҳҘз§ҚжқҘзқҖгҖӮ
еӣ дёәжғіиҮӘе·ұеҒҡеҸ‘йҘ°жӢҚз…§жүҖд»ҘжңүдәҶиҝҷдёӘи§Ҷйў‘
з”Ёзңҹдёқеёғж–ҷеҒҡдәҶдәӣвҖңз»ўиҠұвҖқе·Ҙиүәзҡ„жұүжңҚйҘ°е“Ғ
и¶ҒзқҖжҳҘиүІжӯЈеҘҪпјҢжЎғиҠұжј«еұұ
еёҰдёҠиҖҒдәәе®¶еҺ»еҘ№дёҖзӣҙжғіеҺ»зҡ„ең°ж–№еҒҡдҪңзҡ„жөӘдәҶжөӘ
дәҶдәҶеҝөжғі
As a spring ritual after the new year, IвҖҷve been busy sowing recently back at home.
In the mood for some hand-made hair accessories,
I made these Hanfu ornaments with silk flowers, and had this video shot.
In this pretty spring, when peach blossoms dye the mountain,
take my dear lady to the place full of memory, where all is found,
and tick yet another one from her wish list.
-----------------------------------------------

жңҖиҝ‘и·ҹеҺ»е№ҙиҝҮе®Ңе№ҙдёҖж ·пјҢжҗҒе®¶йҮҢеҝҷжҳҘз§ҚжқҘзқҖгҖӮ

иҮӘеҲҶгҒ®жүӢдҪңгӮҠгҒ®й«ӘйЈҫгӮҠгӮ’иў«гҒЈгҒҰеҶҷзңҹгӮ’ж’®гӮҠгҒҹгҒ„гҒӢгӮүгҖҒгҒ“гҒ®еӢ•з”»гӮ’гҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮ
гӮ·гғ«гӮҜз”ҹең°гӮ’дҪҝгҒЈгҒ§гҖҒжјўжңҚгҒ®йЈҫгӮҠгӮ’гҖҢзө№иҠұгҖҚгҒ§дҪңгӮҠгҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮ

zh-CN.title: Make a peach blossom crown with silk flowers | з”Ёз»ўиҠұе·ҘиүәеҒҡдәҶеҘ—жЎғиҠұеҸ‘еҶ пјҢеёҰдёҠзҲұдәәжөӘдәҶдёҖжҠҠжҳҘеӨ©дёЁLiziqi Channel
zh-CN.description:
Please  subscribe to гҖҗжқҺеӯҗжҹ’ Liziqi гҖ‘Liziqi Channel on YouTube if you like my videos: https://goo.gl/nkjpSx 
#жқҺеӯҗжҹ’#Liziqi#lГҪtб»ӯthбәҘ#ChineseCuisine #ChineseFood
 гҖҗжқҺеӯҗжҹ’ Liziqi гҖ‘ https://goo.gl/nkjpSx
--------------------------------------------------------------------
Make a peach blossom crown with silk flowers, and catch the spring breeze with my dear Granny.

жңҖиҝ‘и·ҹеҺ»е№ҙиҝҮе®Ңе№ҙдёҖж ·пјҢжҗҒе®¶йҮҢеҝҷжҳҘз§ҚжқҘзқҖгҖӮ
еӣ дёәжғіиҮӘе·ұеҒҡеҸ‘йҘ°жӢҚз…§жүҖд»ҘжңүдәҶиҝҷдёӘи§Ҷйў‘
з”Ёзңҹдёқеёғж–ҷеҒҡдәҶдәӣвҖңз»ўиҠұвҖқе·Ҙиүәзҡ„жұүжңҚйҘ°е“Ғ
и¶ҒзқҖжҳҘиүІжӯЈеҘҪпјҢжЎғиҠұжј«еұұ
еёҰдёҠиҖҒдәәе®¶еҺ»еҘ№дёҖзӣҙжғіеҺ»зҡ„ең°ж–№еҒҡдҪңзҡ„жөӘдәҶжөӘ
дәҶдәҶеҝөжғі
As a spring ritual after the new year, IвҖҷve been busy sowing recently back at home.
In the mood for some hand-made hair accessories,
I made these Hanfu ornaments with silk flowers, and had this video shot.
In this pretty spring, when peach blossoms dye the mountain,
take my dear lady to the place full of memory, where all is found,
and tick yet another one from her wish list.
-----------------------------------------------

snippet.title: Ako Naman Muna - Angela Ken (Music Video)
snippet.description:
Trigger Warning: This content may contain video clip references to topics such as self-harm and violence which others might find disturbing. Please engage in self-care as you watch this video.
 
If you or someone you know needs help, contact the National Center for Mental Health through the ff.:

в–Ә 1553 (Luzon-wide landline toll-free)

GLOBE / TM Subscribers
в–Ә 0917-899-8727
в–Ә 0966-351-4518

SMART / SUN / TNT Subscribers
в–Ә 0908-639-2672

Sundan sila sa Twitter (twitter.com/ncmhhotline) at Facebook (facebook.com/ncmhcrisishotline) para sa iba pang impormasyon.

The NCMH crisis hotline is a 24-hour service meant to respond to mental health-related queries. It connects the public to mental health professionals to provide the necessary counseling and proper triaging to those who are in crisis.

Ako Naman Muna
Words and Music by: Angela Ken 
Performed by: Angela Ken 
Mixed and Mastered by: Tim Recla  
Produced by: Jonathan Manalo

Out Now on all digital music stores and platforms 

TikTok Sound Page: https://vt.tiktok.com/ZSJ2Pc76G/вҖӢ

Listen here: https://backl.ink/144559806вҖӢ

Watch the official lyric video visualizer on Star Music Youtube channel - https://youtu.be/1vzg7-tsV40вҖӢ

Production: YouMeUs MNL
Director: Amiel Kirby Balagtas
Writer: Edgar Dale ReciГұa 
Storyboard: Donna Rey
DOP, Offline and Online Editor, Colourist: Jonathan Penarejo
Second camera: Sadam Tejol
Prod Head: Xavier Alfonso

Star Music Digital Production Team
Digital Content Producer: Jaliza Baluyut
Graphics and Cover Art: Andrew Castillo
Digital Support Specialist: Ice Almazan
Digital Content Publisher: Jam Esquillo
Head, Digital Content Production: William The Invincible Garcia

ADProm Head: Jeff Victoria 
ADProm Specialist: Iaan Cajocson
Social Media Specialist: Naomi Enriquez 

Published by Star Songs 
Head, Star Songs and New Media: Atty Marivic Benedicto 
Digital Publisher: Jam Esquillo

Executive Producer Roxy Liquigan


Lyrics:

(Verse 1)
Kada hakbang sa lupaвҖҷy para akong inaalon
at nalulunod sa batikos ng mundo,
sa kung ano lamang ang kaya ko.

Pigang-piga na sa mga problemang вҖҳdi masolusyonan agad.
Parang wala ng bukas,
pwede bang umiwas?
Hinahanap ang sarili ngunit вҖҳdi na kakayanin sa ligaw na dinadaanan ko.
вҖҳSan na вҖҳto patungo?
вҖҳSan na вҖҳko patungo?

(CHORUS)
Dahan-dahan nating simulan muli ang pag-hakbang.
Dahan-dahang tumingin sa salamin upang makita ang ating kagandahan. 
Dahan-dahang iangat ang mukha upang masilayan ang payapang kalangitan.
Oo, pagod ka na. 
Pero вҖҳdi ka nag-iisa. 
KayaвҖҷt lumaban ka. 
At sabihing,
вҖңAko naman munaвҖқ.

(Verse 2)
Kada langhap sa hangin pansin ko na lagi nalang usok.
Walang malinis halos puro polusyon,
parang ako raw na konsumisyon. 
Gulong-gulo ang isip вҖҳsan ba lulugar kapag nag-kamali. 
Grabe sila manghusga,
bakit perpekto ba sila?

Huminga ka ng malalim at isipin ng mabuti
ang mga desisyong ilalaan para sa kinabukasan.
Nang makapunta sa
paroroonan.. Kung

(CHORUS)
Dahan-dahan nating simulan muli ang pag-hakbang.
Dahan-dahang tumingin sa salamin upang makita ang ating kagandahan. 
Dahan-dahang iangat ang mukha upang masilayan ang payapang kalangitan.
Oo, pagod ka na. 
Pero вҖҳdi ka nag-iisa. 
KayaвҖҷt lumaban ka. 
At sabihing,
вҖңAko naman munaвҖқ.

(Bridge)
Huwag papalamon sa lungkot l,
huwag hahayaang malugmok 
ang puso mo sa ibabato saвҖҷyo ng iba. 
Tandaan mong sapat ka...

Dahan-dahang tanggalin ang maskara at hayaang tumulo ang bumabadyang mga luha. 
Dahan-dahang iangat ang mukha upang masilayan ang mga taong ikaвҖҷy pinapahalagahan. 
Oo, pagod ka na. 
Pero вҖҳdi ka nag-iisa.
KayaвҖҷt lumaban ka. 
At sabihing, 
вҖңAko naman munaвҖқ.

http://bit.ly/StarMusicPHChannel

http://starmusic.abs-cbn.com

snippet.title: GRAB DRIVER AT OWNER NG LUGAW PILIPINAS, NAGSALITA!
snippet.description:
MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

Gayunpaman, puwede ninyong i-PM ang inyong mga sumbong sa OFFICIAL Facebook page ni Idol na RAFFY TULFO IN ACTION na may mahigit 17 MILLION Followers. Nakahanda pong tumugon sa inyo ang RTIA researchers.

Maraming salamat sa inyong pag-unawa at mag-ingat po tayong lahat!

snippet.title: Tensions rise as Beijing steps up military presence in South China Sea
snippet.description:

The New York Times' Beijing bureau chief Steven Lee Myers joins CBSN's "Red & Blue" anchor Elaine Quijano with more on how the need for vaccines is complicating the response from other nations in the region, and how the U.S. could become involved.

snippet.title: The life of the super-rich in Central Africa | DW Documentary
snippet.description:
Many millionaires live in the Democratic Republic of Congo, one of the world's poorest countries. This film depicts some of those who have made fortunes amid the chaos, including musicians, mining bosses, entrepreneurs and preachers.

The DRC is rich in raw materials, but only a few profit from its natural resources. While 60% of Congo's inhabitants live on less than $1.25 per day, businessmen, artists, former rebel leaders and evangelists are reaping the rewards of economic growth. In the capital, Kinshasa, these new rich live in safe and luxurious enclaves, while children toil in coltan mines in the eastern part of the country.
Fally Ipupa has made his money with music. Others rely on their business acumen, like Patricia Nzolantima, who founded a taxi company and aims to give more opportunities to women.
With 3,000 mine workers, Cooperamma is the largest employer in North Kivu, in the east of the DRC. Managing director Robert Seninga says his coltan mines are extremely well-run, yet safety standards are poor. Coltan, a globally coveted mineral, is used in cell phones and other devices. ItвҖҷs both a blessing and a curse for the Congo. It makes some rich, but for others it means death. The region still suffers from ethnic and factional conflicts, with money from illegal coltan smuggling financing new violence. ItвҖҷs a vicious cycle.

ЩҖЩҖЩҖЩҖЩҖ

snippet.title: Baylor wins the 2021 NCAA basketball championship | extended highlights
snippet.description:
Baylor dominated from wire to wire to defeat Gonzaga and win the 2021 National Championship! The Bears won their first title in program history behind 22 points from Jared Butler and 19 from MaCio Teague. Watch the extended highlights here.

Watch highlights, game recaps, and much more from the 2021 NCAA Division I MenвҖҷs Basketball Tournament on the official NCAA March Madness YouTube channel. Subscribe now to be updated on the latest videos: http://www.youtube.com/marchmadness?sub_confirmation=1

snippet.title: Taylor Swift - You Belong With Me (Taylor's Version) (Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Official lyric video for вҖңYou Belong With MeвҖқ (TaylorвҖҷs Version) вҖ“ off her Fearless (TaylorвҖҷs Version) album. Get the album here: https://taylor.lnk.to/fearlesstaylorsversion. 

в–әSubscribe to Taylor Swift on YouTube: https://ts.lnk.to/subscribe 
 
в–әExclusive Merch: http://taylorswift.lnk.to/store

в–әFollow Taylor Swift online:
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylorswift  
Facebook: http://facebook.com/taylorswift  
Tumblr: http://taylorswift.tumblr.com  
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylorswift13  
Snapchat: http://snapchat.com/add/taylorswift
Website: http://www.taylorswift.com  

в–әFollow Taylor Nation Online
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylornation  
Tumblr: http://taylornation.tumblr.com  
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylornation13
TikTok: http://tiktok.com/@taylornation

Official Lyrics:
 
YouвҖҷre on the phone with your girlfriend 
SheвҖҷs upset, sheвҖҷs going off about something that you said 
Cause she doesnвҖҷt get your humor like I do 

IвҖҷm in my room itвҖҷs a typical Tuesday night
IвҖҷm listening to the kind of music she doesnвҖҷt like 
And sheвҖҷll never know your story like I do 

Cause she wears short skirts, I wear t-shirts 
SheвҖҷs cheer captain and IвҖҷm on the bleachers 
Dreaming вҖҳbout the day when you wake up and find 
That what youвҖҷre looking for has been here the whole time 

If you could see that IвҖҷm the one who understands you 
Been here all along so why canвҖҷt you see 
You belong with me
 You belong with me 

Walk in the streets with you in your worn out jeans 
I canвҖҷt help thinking this is how it ought to be 
Laughing on a park bench thinking to myself, hey isnвҖҷt this easy 

And youвҖҷve got a smile that could light up this whole town 
I havenвҖҷt seen it in a while since she brought you down 
You say youвҖҷre fine I know you better than that 
Hey what you doing with a girl like that 

She wears high heels, I wear sneakers 
SheвҖҷs cheer captain and IвҖҷm on the bleachers 
Dreaming вҖҳbout the day when you wake up and find 
That what youвҖҷre looking for has been here the whole time 

If you could see that IвҖҷm the one who understands you 
Been here all along so why canвҖҷt you see 
You belong with me 
Standing by waiting at your back door 
All this time how could you not know baby 
You belong with me 
You belong with me 

Oh I remember you driving to my house in the middle of the night 
IвҖҷm the one who makes you laugh when you know youвҖҷre вҖҳbout to cry 
I know your favorite songs and you tell me about your dreams 
I think I know where you belong, I think I know itвҖҷs with me 

CanвҖҷt you see that IвҖҷm the one who understands you 
Been here all along so why canвҖҷt you see 
You belong with me 
Standing by waiting at your back door 
All this time how could you not know baby 
You belong with me 
You belong with me 
You belong with me 
Have you ever thought just maybe 
You belong with me 
You belong with me

#taylorswift #youbelongwithme #fearlesstaylorsversion

snippet.title: Journey To The Forbidden Valley | Full Family Adventure Bigfoot Movie
snippet.description:
A boy and his guardian encounter the mysterious Yeren-- an elusive ape-man creature.
Subscribe рҹ‘ү http://bit.ly/SubToFamCentral | More Free Movies рҹ‘үhttp://bit.ly/FamlyMovies
**This film is under non-exclusive license from ITN Distribution. All rights reserved**

Year Released : 2017
Director: Ethan Wiley
Writers: Chris Walas (co-writer) | Ethan Wiley (co-writer)
Stars: Sasha Jackson | Douglas Tait | Erroll Shand

After a small airplane crash lands in a remote area of Central China, several passengers survive, including a Chinese boy and his American guardian. As they wait to be rescued, they soon encounter the mysterious Yeren-- an elusive ape-man creature rumored to have inhabited the Shennongjia mountains for many centuries. When ruthless poachers arrive to capture the Yeren, our heroes must decide if the unique creature is their friend or foe.

snippet.title: Gonzaga vs. UCLA - Final Four NCAA tournament extended highlights
snippet.description:
Gonzaga held on in the final seconds of overtime after a clutch three-point buzzer-beating bucket by Jalen Suggs to send the Bulldogs to the National Championship Game. The Zags had all five starters in double-figures, led by Drew Timme with 25 points and Joel Ayayi with 22 points and 6 boards. Watch the full game highlights.

snippet.title: TURNING 36 PART 2: UNBOXING GIFTS | Heart Evangelista
snippet.description:
My first unboxing video is here! Plenty of my favorite brands like Kate Spade, Bally, Massimo Dutti and so much more gifts for my 36th birthday from SSI. Enjoy! вҷҘпёҸ

LOVE MARIE ONGPAUCO-ESCUDERO (known in the Philippine entertainment industry as Heart Evangelista) started her career at the age of 13 as a commercial model and actress. Her 20 years of hard work paved the way to numerous acting and hosting projects and awards. Through the years, she has evolved from being a professional actor and television host to a sought-after international and local brand endorser, sold-out visual artist, best-selling author, fashion influencer, beauty icon, and entrepreneur. She is one of the countryвҖҷs most recognized celebrities, and advocates for childrenвҖҷs health and education, individuals with special needs, and animal welfare. She wishes to share these passions with the world through this platform.

snippet.title: рҹ”ҙ [Live in HD] ONE On TNT I
snippet.description:
The biggest month in ONE Championship history begins on Thursday, 8 April, as ONE on TNT I airs LIVE right here on YouTube at 8:30 a.m. SGT (some regions excluded).

In the main event, reigning ONE Flyweight World Champion Adriano Moraes defends his belt against all-time great Demetrious Johnson in the biggest flyweight mixed martial arts fight in history! 

In the co-main event, American legend Eddie Alvarez takes on dangerous #2-ranked contender Iuri Lapicus in a pivotal lightweight mixed martial arts showdown!

They are joined on this stacked card by Muay Thai superstar Rodtang Jitmuangnon, Senegalese wrestling sensation "Reug Reug," American warrior Tyler McGuire, and more!

MAIN CARD:

Catchweight Muay Thai (61.5kg)
Rodtang Jitmuangnon vs. Danial Williams

Flyweight World Championship
Adriano Moraes vs. Demetrious Johnson
 
Lightweight Mixed Martial Arts
Eddie Alvarez vs. Iuri Lapicus

LEAD CARD:

Welterweight Mixed Martial Arts
Tyler McGuire vs. Raimond Magomedaliev

Featherweight Kickboxing
Enriko Kehl vs. Chingiz Allazov

Heavyweight Mixed Martial Arts
Reug Reug vs. Patrick Schmid

Watch ONE on TNT I LIVE on 7 April:
10pm ET/10pm PT on TNT
10pm ET/7pm PT on TNT app
8:30pm ET/5:30pm PT on @Bleacher Report Live   
Check your local listings: http://bit.ly/HowToWatchONEonTNT

#ONEonTNT #ONEChampionship

аёӯаёўаё№а№Ҳаё”а№үаё§аёўаёҒаёұаёҷа№„аёӣаёҷаёІаёҷа№Ҷ аёӯаёўа№ҲаёІа№ҖаёӣаёҘаёөа№Ҳаёўаёҷа№„аёӣ

аё–аё¶аёҮа№Җаёӣа№ҮаёҷаёҘаёёаёҮ аёҒа№ҮаёҲаё°а№Җаёӣа№ҮаёҷаёҘаёёаёҮаё—аёөа№ҲаёЈаёұаёҒа№Ғаё„а№Ҳа№Җаёҳаёӯ

аёҲаё°аёЈаёұаёҒаёүаёұаёҷаёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮаёҷаёөа№ү аёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮаёҷаёөа№ү аё•аёҘаёӯаё”а№„аёӣа№ғаёҠа№Ҳа№„аё«аёЎ
аёӯаёөаёҒаёӘаёҙаёҡаёӣаёөаёҒа№ҮаёўаёұаёҮаёҲаё°аёЈаёұаёҒ а№ғаёҠа№Ҳаё«аёЈаё·аёӯа№ҖаёӣаёҘа№ҲаёІ

кё°нҡҚ/н•ҳнҳ„мў…  н”„лЎңл“Җм„ң/мқҙм•„лҰ¬л”°  м§„н–ү/мқҙмқҖмһ¬  кө¬м„ұ/мқҙмқҖмһ¬ мқҙк·ңнқ¬ мқҙм„ём •  мҙ¬мҳҒ/мҳӨмұ„мҳҒ м •нӣҲ мөңмҶЎмқё мЎ°л¬ём°¬ мһ„м„ёмў… м „мһ¬мӣҗ  лҸҷмӢңл…№мқҢ/мҶҢлҰ¬лҘј к·ёлҰ¬лӢӨ  л””мһҗмқёВ·CG/к№Җн•ҳкІҪ к№Җн•ңмҶ”  лӢҙлӢ№мқён„ҙ/к№ҖмқҖл№„ мқҙмҲҳнҳ„  л§ҲмјҖнҢ…/лӮЁмҠ№нӣҲ к№Җмң м§„ м •м•„лҰ„  мЎ°м—°м¶ңВ·нҺём§‘/мҳӨн•ңмЈј  м—°м¶ң/нҷҚлҜјм§Җ  м ңмһ‘/SBSл””м§Җн„ёлүҙмҠӨлһ© нҒ¬лҰ¬м—җмқҙнӢ°лёҢ мӮ¬м—…л¶Җл¬ё  м ңмһ‘м§Җмӣҗ/н•ңкөӯл§ҘлҸ„лӮ л“ң(мң )
